blended.narrative: Nakiska is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,248 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 11°F. Expect powder.
